title: America's Birthday: Founding Heroes
description: This coloring page introduces young learners to key figures and symbols from America's founding period in a simplified, age-appropriate format.
instructions: Color the different elements of America's founding story. Read the learning facts with an adult to learn more about each part of the picture.

content.image: A simplified scene showing George Washington, the Liberty Bell, an American flag with 13 stars, and Independence Hall building in Philadelphia.

elements.name: George Washington
elements.description: America's first president wearing his general's uniform

elements.name: Liberty Bell
elements.description: Famous bell with a crack that was rung to celebrate independence

elements.name: Original American Flag
elements.description: Flag with 13 stars arranged in a circle

elements.name: Independence Hall
elements.description: Building where the Declaration of Independence was signed

learningFacts: The United States became a country in 1776.
George Washington led American soldiers before becoming the first president.
The Liberty Bell is an important American symbol of freedom.
The first American flag had 13 stars for the original 13 colonies.
